intro: Himantoglossum viride, also known as the Green Helleborine, is a terrestrial orchid native to Europe and Western Asia. The plant has been traditionally used in herbal medicine for its potential health benefits, including anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant properties, which may help to soothe digestive issues, reduce fever, and protect against oxidative stress.
